---
title: "Welcome to the blog"
date: 2026-06-21
categories: [news, fieldwork, photography] # tags — keep it to 3 max
description: "First post — what this space is for."
---

This is where I'll share field notes, marine ecology, photography, and the
occasional story from the reef.

To add a new post, copy this folder, rename it, and edit the front matter above.
Tag it with up to three `categories:` and they'll show up in the filter on the
[blog index](../../index.qmd). That's the whole workflow.
